query: Microsoft Ignite opening keynote speaker replacement Satya Nadella absence
a_issues: One result (Winaero) is truncated but confirms the core fact. No major factual flaws; content is consistent across results.
b_issues: Includes a low-value/irrelevant result (news.microsoft.com/source/speeches page with generic nav content, no useful info). No factual flaws in the substantive results.
reasoning: Both sets clearly and accurately establish the key facts: Satya Nadella will not deliver the Ignite 2025 opening keynote for the first time, and Judson Althoff (Microsoft's newly appointed CEO of commercial business) will replace him. Content A provides this via Windows Central, Winaero, Reddit, and LinkedIn/Fortune excerpt, all consistent. Content B provides it via Fortune, Yahoo Finance (fullest account, including Nadella's stated reason for stepping back), LinkedIn, and Petri, with one irrelevant/low-value result (Microsoft speeches page). Content B's Yahoo Finance excerpt adds slightly more context (Nadella's internal focus reasoning), while Content A's Windows Central result gives a clean direct confirmation. Both are equally sufficient and accurate for answering the question, with no contradictions in either set.
